title: Package enum members not bound in case statement
body:
When I import a package, the various members of enums are not able to bind as cases in a case statement. I'm using version 10.2.

I encountered this in a larger design but created the following contrived test case that hopefully illustrates the issue.

File: ALUPkg.sv
```
package ALUPkg;
    typedef enum logic [1:0] {
        PASS_A = 2'b00,
        ADD = 2'b01,
        SUB = 2'b10
    } ALUOpType;
endpackage: ALUPkg
```
File: ALU_bind_error.sv
```
module ALU_bind_error (
    input ALUPkg::ALUOpType ALUOp,
    input logic [31:0] A,
    input logic [31:0] B,
    output logic [31:0] out
);

import ALUPkg::*;

always @(*) begin
    case(ALUOp)
        PASS_A: out = A;
        ADD: out = A + B;
        SUB: out = A - B;
        default: out = A;
    endcase
end

endmodule: ALU_bind_error
```
Compilation:
```
iverilog -g2012 -tnull -s ALU_bind_error ALUPkg.sv ALU_bind_error.sv 
ALU_bind_error.sv:13: error: Unable to bind wire/reg/memory `PASS_A' in `ALU_bind_error'
ALU_bind_error.sv:14: error: Unable to bind wire/reg/memory `ADD' in `ALU_bind_error'
ALU_bind_error.sv:15: error: Unable to bind wire/reg/memory `SUB' in `ALU_bind_error'
3 error(s) during elaboration.
```
For what it is worth, invoking verilator version 4.008 and commercial tools on the above code and my larger design works as expected.

As a seemingly silly workaround, creating an unused variable of the type successfully imports the enum members and allows them to be used in cases:

File: ALUPkg.sv (same as before)
File: ALU_no_error.sv
```
module ALU_no_error (
    input ALUPkg::ALUOpType ALUOp,
    input logic [31:0] A,
    input logic [31:0] B,
    output logic [31:0] out
);

import ALUPkg::*;

ALUOpType do_nothing; //useless code
assign do_nothing = PASS_A; //useless code

always @(*) begin
    case(ALUOp)
        PASS_A: out = A;
        ADD: out = A + B;
        SUB: out = A - B;
        default: out = A;
    endcase
end

endmodule: ALU_no_error
```
Compilation:
```
iverilog -g2012 -tnull -s ALU_no_error ALUPkg.sv ALU_no_error.sv
(no output)
```
code_blocks:
iverilog -g2012 -tnull -s ALU_bind_error ALUPkg.sv ALU_bind_error.sv 
ALU_bind_error.sv:13: error: Unable to bind wire/reg/memory `PASS_A' in `ALU_bind_error'
ALU_bind_error.sv:14: error: Unable to bind wire/reg/memory `ADD' in `ALU_bind_error'
ALU_bind_error.sv:15: error: Unable to bind wire/reg/memory `SUB' in `ALU_bind_error'
3 error(s) during elaboration.
